Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
12.9.7 The Caves of Delmarin
Located deep beneath the
Halls
of
Blackrock
are the Caves of
Delmarin
. The
Caves are a warren of tunnels and caverns that are inhabited by the
devoutly xenophobic Dyissans. The Dyissans are a
race
of half-human half-
snake people led by their evil queen, Taralis, and they despise the
intrusion of any outsiders, including the Dwarves of Blackrock. The
Dyissans are a gruesome race, and any captured by them face the fate of
either being eaten or becoming a
target
dummy for the Dyissan warriors.
In the year 922 AF, the Caves of Delmarin were destroyed amid the corruption of
Yggdrasil
.
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
